description: A vertical outreach card for ICE's VOICE program. The right two-thirds is a warm-toned stock photograph of two pairs of hands clasped together, with a seated person (blurred, in light blue and gray clothing). A blue translucent panel covers the left third and an orange angled wedge is at the lower right. On the left panel, white text reads 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by a very large bold white 'HELP'. A white footer bar at the bottom contains contact information in blue and orange: '1-855-48-VOICE' and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE', alongside the VOICE logo (a stylized blue 'V' checkmark) with text 'VOICE - VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT'. The palette is blue and orange.
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP. 1-855-48-VOICE. ICE.GOV/VOICE. VOICE - Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement.
